component.name: Immich-Go GUI
component.summary: A powerful graphical interface for the immich-go CLI

description.p: Immich-Go GUI is an unofficial, user-friendly graphical interface for the immich-go command-line tool. It simplifies the process of uploading, archiving, and organizing photos on your Immich server.

Whether you are migrating from Google Photos with Takeout archives, uploading local folders, or archiving your entire Immich server, this tool provides a native, robust interface to manage your tasks without touching the terminal.

ul.li: Upload from local folders or Google Photos Takeout archives.
Archive photos and metadata from your Immich server.
Organize assets and manage RAW+JPEG/HEIC+JPEG stacking automatically.
Extensive filtering options for dates, albums, tags, and camera models.
